name: LITHIUM BATTERY CHARGER AL 69.4V 6A
features: Protection Features: Overvoltage, overcurrent, short circuit, overheating
description: The AL 69V+6A EV Charger is designed for fast and efficient charging of 60V lithium-ion(LIFEPO4) battery systems. It provides a stable output of 69V with a 6A charging current, ensuring optimal and rapid charging for electric vehicles, e-bikes, and other 60V battery-powered devices. Equipped with built-in safety features such as overvoltage, overcurrent, short circuit, and overheating protection, it ensures both the charger and battery's safety and longevity. Compact, lightweight, and portable, the charger is perfect for home or on-the-go charging. Its energy-efficient performance maximizes battery life and ensures consistent, reliable power delivery for long-term use.
